spec.name: A Tunnel
spec.description: This forking off from the mail tunnel seems odd; the walls are strangely smooth, as if they were carved out by forces unknown. The end is abrupt and short, but there is a steel door inset in the wall of the west side of the tunnel. The smell from the lower tunnel doesn't seem nearly as bad here... this might be a good place to rest and catch your breath.

west.description: A large steel door. There seems to be no hinges or knob, but there is a small keyhole in the exact center of it.
